notes: NEW: LUT color grading - apply any .cube look as the final grade on every exported photo, live in the eyepiece, with seven built-in film & cinema presets (Warm Film, Portrait Film, Vivid Slide, Classic B&W, Teal & Orange, Cinema Roll-off, Matte Fade). Plus bug fixes: the camera UI now scales as one unit at any window size.
notes_mac: NEW: LUT color grading - apply any .cube look as the final grade on every exported photo, live in the eyepiece, with seven built-in film & cinema presets (Warm Film, Portrait Film, Vivid Slide, Classic B&W, Teal & Orange, Cinema Roll-off, Matte Fade). Improved: harsh-daylight photos get their shadows opened automatically, halo-free. Plus bug fixes: the camera UI now scales as one unit at any window size.
